creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
graphics/opencoloriov1 and graphics/openimageio-ociov1 were created to provide old library versions to support the blender-lts28 port which has been deleted after EOL.

These two ports are now no longer needed and can be removed.

This would also appear to leave devel/yaml-cpp03 no longer needed.
